issueContext.title: agent-core: structured output (JSON mode) + vision/multimodal input
issueContext.body:
## Summary
No JSON mode, schema validation, or typed returns. No image input support.

### Structured Output
Need outputFormat option (json_schema, json_object), schema definitions.

### Vision/Multimodal
Need vision support in session options (base64, URLs), image params in tool results.

Ref: `docs/agent-layer-gaps.md`

comments.author: tmuskal
comments.body:
**Depends on:** #575 (streaming foundation needed for vision/multimodal responses)
**Related:** #588 (tool system needs image params in ToolResult for vision)

comments.author: a5c-ai
comments.body: Triage says agent-core needs a provider-normalized API for structured JSON output and multimodal/vision input. Affected files: packages/agent-core/src/session.ts, packages/agent-core/src/types.ts, packages/agent-core/src/session.test.ts, docs/agent-layer-gaps.md. Current session.ts models provider messages as Array<{ role: string; content: string }> and prompt(text: string) builds a single text user message before calling OpenAI/Azure/Anthropic APIs. OpenAI/Azure request bodies send only model, messages, and max_completion_tokens; Anthropic sends text messages only. AgentCoreSessionOptions has no structured output or image fields, AgentCorePromptResult only exposes output: string, and ToolResult is text-only. Recommended approach: add optional public structured-output types, multimodal prompt types, provider-normalized internal request representation, provider payload tests, validation errors, plain text backward compatibility, and coordinate but do not duplicate #588.

dependsOn.summary: Streaming foundation needed for vision/multimodal responses

related.summary: Tool system needs image params in ToolResult for vision

qualityGates: Contract tests are written before implementation and cover provider payloads plus backward compatibility.
OpenAI and Azure structured output mappings include json_object and json_schema request bodies.
Anthropic structured-output behavior is implemented or explicitly documented as the chosen fallback strategy.
Vision input supports image URL and base64 content parts with validation before provider dispatch.
Plain prompt(text, timeout?) behavior remains source-compatible and test-covered.
Docs distinguish issue #582 agent-core session/options/result scope from #588 ToolResult image support.

githubHandoff.targetPrTitle: Implement agent-core structured output and vision input
